actions.value:
Thanks for reaching out.
In order to help you we need to identify your exchange, let me ask you these questions:
​
1. Can you please send us the Exchange Details in plain text? Click on the exchange transaction, click on Exchange Details, copy/paste the text here.
2. Can you please send us the Exchange Status Page in plain text, that you should find right under the Exchange Details?
3. Can you send us the transaction ID plain text? Go at the bottom of the transaction page, click View Advanced transaction data, copy/paste the transaction ID here.


Thanks.
